title: Minecrafts heropack
description: A mod that adds minecraft themed heros and powers to the game.
body:
all characters in this mod are HEAVILY minecraft themed, making me NOT the owner. Mojang is, as they own the designs, technically. 

the characters in the mod are: 

1. Redstonian - With a suit comprised of redstone technology’s, including piston boots, wireless redstone signal, night vision visor. And more. The suit can also enter a "sentry" mode. 

Full description of backstory: 

After discovering redtone, a player was trying to figure out new and better ways to fend off the dangerous mobs of the overworld, eventually finding a Recipe for “Redstone circuits” using these, he managed to build a suit of armor that allows the wearer basic flight, the ability to shoot TNT, and a Sentry mode. Using this suit he became the first of many heroes to develop ways to fight off the hostile mobs, sending his suits out across the world to fight off monsters.

How to obtain: crafting (JEI recommended) 

2. Mobmaster - a player who was mutated by Mob space, now shares the powers of many of Minecraft’s creatures, including fire balls, teleportation, flight, strength, and many others. 

Full description of backstory:

Once a regular player, after fighting off mobs until the verge of death. He took the leap of faith into a storm ridden sea, while chugging down an experimental potion, upon consuming it. He forcefully granted himself access to the “mob space” a force of energy that all mobs tap into for their natural abilities. Granting him the powers of hostile mobs. 

How to obtain: drink level 3 potion of Mob space (craftable potion)

3. Darkbrew - an evil player who gave himself permanent potion effects that make him a threat, but still able to be dealt with. Speed 3, strength 3, regeneration 3, resistance 3. And more. 

Full description of backstory:

Once a scientist player, who became obsessed with potions and their mystical powers, he sought to find a way to make them permanent. Eventually, using a bottle of souls (XP bottle) he turna that into a potion of darkbrew. Granting himself the powers, and then made a suit to hide his identity. He used his potion based powers to take over a city in the overworld. Before being stopped by the “hero watch” a team of players with amazing abilities.

How to obtain: drink potion of darkbrew (brew a WATER BOTTLE into a brewing stand with a bottle o enchanting as the ingredient) 

4. lapismode - can switch between all game modes (Can be in creative mode for 80 ticks max) 

Full description of backstory:

Being one of roughly 4 people to have EVER seen a command block, he sought to obtain its power. By trying to create his own, however, he failed and that resulted in him gaining the powers to switch his body between a godlike form that can summon any item, or a phasing form. as well as his regular survival body. (creative, spectator and survival)

How to obtain: crafting (Use JEI also) 

5. Silvermite - a hero whose powers are based around Minecraft insects (spiders, ender mites, silverfish, bees) (mostly focused on SIlverfish and endermites, right click to use poison attack when close to enemies) 

Full description of backstory:

A faulty potion mixed with using an ender pearl ended up granting him these powers. And his suit too. Using these powers he joined the “hero watch” just like others with great powers. using them, he was part of the hero watch who stopped Darkbrew in his atempted to rule over the overworld.

How to obtain: use ender pearl while affected with bad omen.

6. Endersculk - a culmination of ender creatures and sculk blocks, this being has no information on who or what it used to be. Teleportation, sonic blasts and super strength. 

Full description of backstory: (only for those who are still reading) 

once a man obsessed with power, getting stronger, always stronger. he then discovered the warden, and somehow figured out a way to combine the power of the warden with the power of the end dimension, fusing himself into a freaky creature with powers from both.

How to obtain: craft a "endersculk heart" and eat it. (Use JEI for the receipe)
